title: Evernight Player Damage Sound
description: Adds custom player damage sounds inspired by Evernight from Honkai: Star Rail. Made for fun after seeing her trending on TikTok!
body:
# 🌙 Evernight Player Damage Sound

Adds custom player damage sounds inspired by **Evernight** from *Honkai: Star Rail*. 
Originally created for fun after seeing her trending on TikTok!

---

## ✨ Features
* **Custom Audio:** Replaces default player hurt sounds with elegant, Evernight-inspired voices.
* **Version Support:** Fully compatible with Minecraft **1.21.x**.
* **Lightweight:** Small file size and highly compatible with other resource packs.
* **Vibe:** Perfect for players who want a calm and sophisticated touch during combat.

---

## 📸 Media
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/buz2F_Mk1TM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

---

## 🛠️ Installation
1.  Download the `.zip` file from the **Files** or **Versions** tab.
2.  Open your Minecraft folder and navigate to `resourcepacks`.
3.  Drop the downloaded `.zip` file into that folder.
4.  In-game, go to **Options** > **Resource Packs** and move it to the selected side.

---

## ⚠️ Important Notes
* This pack **only** changes player hurt sounds; no other sound effects or textures are modified.
* **Disclaimer:** This is a fan-made project. All sounds are for entertainment purposes only, and no copyrighted assets are intended to be infringed.
* Works flawlessly on both **Singleplayer** and **Multiplayer** (Java Edition).

---

## 👥 Credits
* **Author:** Tonlocalbytes
* **Inspiration:** Evernight (Honkai: Star Rail)

---
*If you like this pack, feel free to leave a ⭐ or follow for more updates!*
